name: notra
title: Notra
description: View, manage, and create content with Notra directly from Raycast.
author: dominikdev

commands.name: view-content
commands.title: List Content
commands.subtitle: Notra
commands.description: Browse and manage your Notra content

commands.name: create-content
commands.title: Create Content
commands.subtitle: Notra
commands.description: Create a new content using AI

commands.name: brand-identities
commands.title: List Brand Identities
commands.subtitle: Notra
commands.description: Browse and manage your Notra brand identities

commands.name: integrations
commands.title: List Integrations
commands.subtitle: Notra
commands.description: Browse and manage your Notra integrations

commands.name: create-brand-identity
commands.title: Create Brand Identity
commands.subtitle: Notra
commands.description: Generate a new brand identity from a website

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your Notra API key with read & write access
preferences.placeholder: Enter your read & write Notra API key

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
